message:
shared,web: Add linesModified tracking for file edits

- Add linesModified field to track lines that were changed (vs added/removed)
- Modifications are detected as paired +/- lines: modified = min(added, removed)
- Count Write tool content as additions
- Normalize OpenCode filePath → file_path for unified format consistency
- Display modified lines in yellow (~N) in index UI
- Add database migration for lines_modified column

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/36da2a71-2e3f-4fe8-89e5-718ac2b07935
